name: Cloud Sofa
description: Soft cushioning designed for everyday comfort and relaxation. Made with premium fabric and high-density foam.

name: Modern Sofa
description: Minimalist sofa with a clean and functional design. Perfect for study areas or modern living rooms.

name: Modern Chair
description: Minimalist chair with a clean and functional design. Ergonomic back support for long hours of seating.

name: Accent Chair
description: Elegant seating piece that adds style to any room. Featuring high-quality upholstery and sturdy wooden legs.

name: Living Room Set
description: Complete set designed for a balanced and modern living space. Solid wood frame with premium leather cushions.

name: Luxury Set
description: Premium furniture collection with elegant finishing and comfort. The ultimate choice for a sophisticated home.

name: Blue Accent Chair
description: Elegant barrel-style accent chair upholstered in soft chenille fabric. Features sculptured channel detailing and gold-toned metal legs. Perfect for reading nooks, bedrooms, or living room corners.

name: Rattan Dining Chair
description: Handcrafted solid wood dining chair with woven rattan backrest and cushioned seat. Blends natural textures with modern minimalist design. Durable and lightweight, ideal for dining rooms or study spaces.

name: Beige Channel Sofa
description: Mid-century inspired two-seater sofa with deep channel tufting and tapered black legs. Upholstered in premium linen-blend fabric. Sophisticated yet comfortable, perfect for compact living rooms or studio apartments.

name: Gray L-Shape Sectional Sofa
description: Modern L-shaped sectional sofa with matching ottoman and accent throw pillows. Upholstered in premium light gray fabric with clean straight-line design. Spacious and versatile, ideal for large living rooms or open-concept spaces.
